◆

Design System Inspired by BrandBuildr

content-bg-dark + content-text-dark (optional main column)

Same YAML tokens as the light catalog: dark shell #020617, indigo primary, canonical phase colours, Build session & dark-canvas for transitions.

button-primary dark-canvas-button
01 / Colors

Shell + dark content

content-bg-dark #020617 · content-text-dark #E2E8F0. Phase hexes match light (canonical targets).

shell-bg / content-bg-dark

02 / Typography

Page title (h1)
h1 24/600/1.3
body-md on dark content
14 / 400 / 1.6

mono-label / StageIndicator

export-serif-h1
03 / dark-canvas (YAML)

dark-slate · dark-canvas-button

backgroundColor dark-slate #1E293B · text dark-slate-text #F8FAFC. Button: #FFF fill, textColor #1E293B (dark-canvas-button).

Session / transition surface (not main shell).

white · indigo-950 text

stage · consensus · facilitator

board-consensus-panel
facilitator-message — border accent indigo

Build session split: slate-950 / slate-900 panels (DESIGN.md Elevation & Depth).
